name: chessagine-mcp-v0.7.1
description: ChessAgine MCP connects LLMs directly to live chess context Stockfish evaluation, board state, positional themes, ChessDB openings, Lichess games, and neural engines like Maia3, Leela, and Elite Leela. It also renders chess positions and full PGN games for deep visual analysis, turning language models into truly chess-aware agents.

LICHESS_API_KEY.title: Lichess API key
LICHESS_API_KEY.description: Your Lichess API token with study:read permission, this token be also used for Lichess explorer. Get a PAT from Lichess here https://lichess.org/account/oauth/token

LICHESS_USERNAME.title: Your Lichess Username
LICHESS_USERNAME.description: Enter your Lichess Username, to help LLM pull your games and other lichess tools

CHESSBOARD_MAGIC_PAT.title: ChessBoardMagic PAT Key
CHESSBOARD_MAGIC_PAT.description: Your ChessBoard Magic Personal Access Token (PAT) which you get from here https://chessboardmagic.com/

POSIRA_API_KEY.title: Posira explorer PAT Key
POSIRA_API_KEY.description: Your Posira API key, get the PAT from here https://posira.dev/dashboard/login
